Uses of Class
com.irurueta.numerical.InvalidBracketRangeException

  • Packages that use InvalidBracketRangeException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.numerical.optimization  
    com.irurueta.numerical.roots
    This package contains classes to find function roots.

    • Uses of InvalidBracketRangeException in com.irurueta.numerical.optimization

      Methods in com.irurueta.numerical.optimization that throw InvalidBracketRangeException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void BracketedSingleOptimizer.computeBracket(double minEvalPoint)
      Computes a bracket of values using provided value as a starting point, and assuming that bracket finishes at Double.MAX_VALUE.
      void BracketedSingleOptimizer.computeBracket(double minEvalPoint, double middleEvalPoint)
      Computes a bracket of values using provided values as a starting point.

      Internal method to set a bracket of values.
      void BracketedSingleOptimizer.setBracket(double minEvalPoint, double middleEvalPoint, double maxEvalPoint)
      Sets a bracket of values to later search for a minimum.
